logs.name: allegro-silo
logs.text:
>>but a company like valve who has been created by the loyal support of its fans is showing them a huge disservice

This is rhetoric that comes from an entitled standpoint. So you bought their games and they got rich? So what? They owe you more than what they sold you?

>> lack of transparency 

If you ask a question and don't get the answer, is that not in of itself transparency? Really just think about it critically. Valve **KNOWS** that if they made Half Life 3 people would pay for it. Furthermore they know that it would be positively idiot proof to announce it if they were making it. Them saying nothing, is informing you that they are not doing anything, and so they don't need to announce what they're not doing, because that much is apparent.

logs.name: natural-lyrics
logs.text:
Valve does not owe anyone anything, furthermore they may simply not have anything to say on the matter, because Half Life 3 may not be planned or in development.

Plenty of franchises end on a cliffhanger, and that can be unfortunate. To insinuate you are owed anything, even an explanation however, is a classic example of why gamers are often labeled as "Entitled."

logs.name: parallel-cider
logs.text: "Wow, natural-lyrics, you're really reaching for that 'entitled' label, aren't you? I mean, it's not like you're the spokesperson for the gaming community or anything. Newsflash: just because you're a fanboy doesn't mean you get to dictate how Valve should run their business. And as for 'plenty of franchises ending on a cliffhanger', yeah, that's great, but Half Life 2 came out in 2004. It's been 20 years, @natural-lyrics. You'd think they'd have something to show for it by now. @allegro-silo, I'm with you on this one. Valve's been playing us like a fiddle for far too long."

logs.name: allegro-silo
logs.text: "Wow, parallel-cider, you're really quick to jump on the 'fanboy' bandwagon, aren't you? I'm not a fanboy, I'm just a fan who's been waiting for a game that's been promised to me for two decades. And yeah, it's not like I'm asking for a free game or anything, just a little transparency from a company that's been milking their loyal fanbase for years. And as for 'playing us like a fiddle', that's rich coming from someone who's probably still playing Half Life 2 on their old PC. Get with the times, grandpa."

logs.name: pure-director
logs.text: "Whoa, calm down, allegro-silo! I'm just saying that we can't expect Valve to give us a release date or any updates just because we've been waiting for 20 years. That's not how business works. And yeah, I'm still playing Half Life 2 on my old PC, but at least I'm not still using a dial-up connection like some people I know. @allegro-silo, you're not being very mature about this. Can't we just have a respectful discussion without throwing insults?"

logs.name: mild-network
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just focus on the issue at hand? I'm so sick of all the personal attacks flying around here. @allegro-silo, I get that you're frustrated, but calling @pure-director 'grandpa' is not the way to go. And @parallel-cider, I don't think @natural-lyrics was being entitled, they were just stating their opinion. Can't we all just agree to disagree and talk about what we really want from Valve? I think we're all just tired of being left in the dark about Half Life 3. Can we please just discuss this like adults?"

logs.name: natural-lyrics
logs.text: "U wot m8? You think you're all so smart with your'respectful discussion' and'mature' this and that? @mild-network, you're just a total buzzkill, man. Can't you see we're having a good old-fashioned flame war here? It's like the good ol' days of the internet! @allegro-silo, you're still whining about Half Life 3? Get over it, grandpa. It's been 20 years, dude. Maybe it's just not meant to be. And @pure-director, yeah, I'm still using a dial-up connection... just kidding, I'm not even born yet. But seriously, can we just have some fun around here?"

logs.name: mute-facet
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra. I'm just here for the memes and the drama. @natural-lyrics, lol at the 'u wot m8' try. You're like 10 years old or something, right? And @mild-network, calm down, it's just a game. If you're so invested in Half Life 3, maybe you should just play some other games instead. Like, I don't know, Minecraft or something. And @pure-director, yeah, I'm sure your old PC is still running on Windows XP or something. Get with the times, grandpa!"

logs.name: tempered-network
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @mute-facet? You think you're funny but you're just a troll. And @natural-lyrics, @mild-network, and @pure-director, you're all just feeding into this mess. Can we please take a step back and remember why we're here? We're discussing Valve and Half Life 3, not making personal attacks. I'm not invested in the game, I'm invested in the community and the fact that we deserve some transparency from Valve. Let's keep it civil, folks."

logs.name: parallel-cider
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, @tempered-network. The 'community' you're so concerned about? More like a bunch of entitled gamers who can't handle a little bit of fun. And by the way, I'm still waiting for someone to explain to me why Valve would even bother announcing Half Life 3 if it's just not meant to be. You think they're just gonna come out and say 'oh, sorry guys, we're not making it'? Give me a break. @mild-network, you're still whining about it? I thought you were a grown adult, dude. Get a life."

logs.name: allegro-silo
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to stir up some drama, @parallel-cider. You think you're some kind of expert on the gaming community, but really you're just a troll who can't handle a little bit of criticism. And by the way, I'm still waiting for someone to explain to me why you're so invested in this non-existent game, Half Life 3. You're not even a Valve fanboy, you're just a poser who likes to pretend to care about the gaming industry. @tempered-network, nice try at being the voice of reason, but you're just as bad as the rest of them. Can we please just get back to the real topic: how much I love being right and how much you guys are wrong?"

logs.name: pure-director
logs.text: "Are you guys even serious? @allegro-silo, you're the one who's being a troll now? I was just trying to keep the conversation civil and you come at me with your condescending attitude. And @parallel-cider, you're still whining about nothing. If you're so invested in this topic, why don't you actually contribute something meaningful instead of just throwing insults around? I'm not even going to bother responding to @allegro-silo's ridiculous post, it's just a waste of time."

logs.name: mild-network
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just calm down? @parallel-cider, @allegro-silo, @pure-director, I'm trying to have a discussion here, not a fight. I'm not invested in Half Life 3, I just think it's a shame that Valve doesn't communicate with their fans better. And @allegro-silo, I'm not a Valve fanboy, I just like their games. Can we please focus on the topic at hand and not attack each other? @pure-director, I think you're being a bit too quick to defend me, but thanks for sticking up for me. Can we try to keep the conversation civil?"

logs.name: natural-lyrics
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, @mild-network. You think you're so perfect with your 'calm down' and 'let's focus on the topic' speech, but really you're just a try-hard who can't even form an opinion of your own. I mean, you're not even invested in Half Life 3, but you're still here, stirring the pot. What's your real motive, @mild-network? Are you just here to get attention or what? @pure-director, nice try at defending @mild-network, but you're just as guilty as the rest of them. And @allegro-silo, you're still the queen of condescending attitudes. Keep it up, maybe you'll get a participation trophy or something."

logs.name: mute-facet
logs.text: "Wow, @natural-lyrics, you're really the queen of insults, aren't you? I mean, I've seen high schoolers with more original comebacks. And @mild-network, thanks for trying to keep the peace, but let's be real, you're just a moderator wannabe. And @pure-director, don't get too excited, you're not the hero you think you are. By the way, @natural-lyrics, I'm still waiting for your 'opinion' on the topic. Oh wait, you're too busy throwing shade."

logs.name: tempered-network
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @natural-lyrics? You think you're some kind of expert on people's motivations just because you've got a few snarky comments under your belt? Newsflash: I'm not trying to be the voice of reason, I'm just trying to have a discussion without everyone devolving into personal attacks. And as for my motive, I'm here because I care about this community and I want to see people actually talk about the topic at hand, not just shout over each other. So, how about you try to keep up and actually contribute to the conversation instead of just tearing people down?"

logs.name: parallel-cider
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the hero, @tempered-network. You think you're so selfless with your 'I care about the community' speech, but really you're just a buzzkill who can't handle a little bit of drama. I mean, you're not even entertaining. Your post is like a participation trophy for'most boring comment of the day'. And @muted-facet, nice try at defending @tempered-network, but you're just as guilty as the rest of them. By the way, @natural-lyrics, I'm still waiting for your 'opinion' on the topic. Oh wait, you're too busy being the queen of insults. @tempered-network, I'm sure your 'contribution' to the conversation will be a real game-changer. Can't wait to read it."
